mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hotel_kiosk.room_master (room_no, room_name, room_type, room_view, room_floor, base_price, max_people, bed_type, area, rating, image_url, updated_at, room_status) VALUES (#{roomNo}, #{roomName}, #{roomType}, #{roomView}, left(room_no, 2), #{basePrice}, #{maxPeople}, #{bedType}, #{area}, #{rating}, #{imageUrl}, localtime, 'active');
INSERT INTO hotel_kiosk.room_status (room_no, current_status, updated_at) VALUES (#{roomNo}, #{currentStatus}, localtime)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.room_master m JOIN hotel_kiosk.room_status s ON m.room_no = s.room_no ORDER BY m.room_no
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.room_master m JOIN hotel_kiosk.room_status s ON m.room_no = s.room_no WHERE m.room_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roomName}, '%') AND m.room_floor = #{roomFloor}
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.room_master m JOIN hotel_kiosk.room_status s ON m.room_no = s.room_no WHERE m.room_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roomNo}, '%') AND m.room_floor = #{roomFloor}
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.room_master m JOIN hotel_kiosk.room_status s ON m.room_no = s.room_no WHERE m.room_no = #{roomNo} AND m.room_floor = #{roomFloor}
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.room_master m JOIN hotel_kiosk.room_status s ON m.room_no = s.room_no WHERE m.room_floor = #{roomFloor}
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.room_master m JOIN hotel_kiosk.room_status s ON m.room_no = s.room_no WHERE m.room_type = #{roomType} AND m.room_floor = #{roomFloor}
